# ChartBarIncreasing

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::ChartBarIncreasing;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        ChartBarIncreasing { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
statistics, analytics, diagram, graph, trending up

## Categories
charts

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/chart-bar-increasing)
